data.title: 国际服卡池「...Was there an incident? Whenever or wherever you need us, the Public Peace Bureau will be there.」

data.body:
[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A New Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 8/1 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Kanna

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 8/1 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 8/11 (Fri) 1:59 AM (UTC)
